name: tatvacare-apidocs
description: TatvaCare AI Platform — documentation + API reference (Zudoku).

scripts.gen-spec: cd .. && PYTHONPATH=backend python -c "import json; from app.main import app; s=app.openapi(); s['servers']=[{'url':'/','description':'Same origin'}]; open('apidocs/apis/openapi.json','w').write(json.dumps(s, indent=2))"
